allow: PowerShell($dest = "C:\\Users\\xnrg2.DESKTOP-5664QR6\\.claude\\projects\\c--Users-xnrg2-DESKTOP-5664QR6-bar-exam\\memory"; Write-Output "Dest exists: $\(Test-Path $dest\)"; Write-Output "Existing files before:"; Get-ChildItem $dest -Name; Write-Output "---ZIP entries---"; $zip = "_migration\\memory-2026-05-27.zip"; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression.FileSystem; $entries = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\(\(Resolve-Path $zip\).Path\); $entries.Entries | Select-Object Name, Length; $entries.Dispose\(\))

PowerShell($zip = \(Resolve-Path "_migration\\memory-2026-05-27.zip"\).Path; Write-Output "ZIP path: $zip"; Write-Output "ZIP size: $\(\(Get-Item $zip\).Length\) bytes"; $tmp = "$env:TEMP\\_pc2_memory_zip_inspect"; if \(Test-Path $tmp\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $tmp }; Expand-Archive -Path $zip -DestinationPath $tmp -Force; Write-Output "Expanded files:"; Get-ChildItem $tmp -Recurse | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime)

PowerShell($zip = \(Resolve-Path "_migration\\memory-2026-05-27.zip"\).Path; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($zip\) | Select-Object -First 8; $hex = $bytes | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('X2'\) }; Write-Output "First 8 bytes \(hex\): $\($hex -join ' '\)"; Write-Output "As ASCII: $\([System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\([byte[]]\([System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($zip\) | Select-Object -First 4\)\)\)")

Bash(grep -oE 'class="[^"]*"' outputs/000_TX/001_刑法/刑TX310.html | sed 's/class="//;s/"$//' | tr ' ' '\\n' | sort -u > /tmp/310_classes.txt; grep -oE '\\.[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_-]*' canonical/GENESIS.html | sort -u | sed 's/^\\.//' > /tmp/genesis_classes.txt; wc -l /tmp/310_classes.txt /tmp/genesis_classes.txt; echo "---classes in 310 but NOT in GENESIS---"; comm -23 /tmp/310_classes.txt /tmp/genesis_classes.txt | head -40)
